sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Khazih le Pawlpi a ding lasa ni,
Thupha ei te kumpi pa, A min pah tawi ni,
Khangno tha hat
lai ut na tawh na sem ni,
Vantung gam thuman a’ ding teci pang ni.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Khazih
it huai hong gumpa
Ei hong tan ding a si;
Si tawh lei sa pawl pi a ding,
Topa hong hang sak
in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khazih leh pawlpi a ding,
Thungen ni ni sim singlamteh pua in,
A dial khai
zui ni, Khasiangtho vangliatna
hong sawlna zui in,
Nuntak sung hun hoih lai tak in na sem
ni.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Khazih leh pawlpi a ding ut na tawh
neih sa siamna leh hun,
Topa min tawh ap
ni,
Cikmah hun bei ngeilo lungsim thuk itna
I neihsa pha bel Topa kiangah pia
ni.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Khazih leh pawlpi a ding nung ta ni,
Kiphat sak na leh aituam lungsim pai
khia ni,
Ngimna lianpi nei in, nisim nungta ni,
Tua ciang Honpa in a kiang hong sam ding hi.
